description: Style Notebaldessarini Concentree M perfume, is composed of metal, sensual accords which blend with a fresh, spicy composition.Product DetailsThe perfume is composed of orange, mandarin and mint, which hide a special masculine metal note in themselves. The spicy heart is composed of patchouli flower, cumin and cloves. The warm and elegant base is composed of sandalwood, spruce, patchouli leaves, tobacco, ambergris and musk.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize75 ml
